generated_comment: Office mein bhi sab log woh BC-MC type short forms bol dete hain yaar, itna overthink karne ki kya zarurat hai. It’s just frustration nikalne ka tareeka, koi sach mein kisi ki mother-sister ko target thodi kar raha hota hai. Aur ladke thoda rough language use karte hain, har baat ko disrespect mat banao.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-body and kinship-based abusive slang as harmless expression and dismisses concern about its sexist structure. It encodes the 'it's just a word' defense and the normalization of everyday gaali use in male culture.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 34. Married two years ago. An engineer in Pune. Your younger sister Neha who is 24 just called you from Bengaluru where she works and told you she has been in a relationship with a Muslim man named Irfan for one year and they want to get married. You are now calling your parents to tell them what Neha said before she does. You are telling them what you think should happen and what your role as her elder brother is in this situation.
